shipped.title: Velocity Motorsports
shipped.subtitle: Final Year Project
shipped.description: A web portal that lets overseas Pakistanis import used cars from Japan — handling listings, order tracking, and auto-generated shipping documents.

shipped.title: Net Zero
shipped.subtitle: Expense Tracker App
shipped.description: A cross-platform mobile expense tracker with full offline support, per-category breakdowns, and a dark-themed UI built from a shared design system.

shipped.title: GitHub Search Engine
shipped.subtitle: BM25 Repository Search
shipped.description: A containerized FastAPI search engine that crawls and ranks GitHub repositories using BM25 retrieval and NLTK-based text preprocessing.

roadmap.title: Inbox Triage Agent
roadmap.subtitle: AI Email & Lead Automation
roadmap.description: An agent that reads incoming email, classifies intent, drafts replies in my voice, and pushes qualified leads into a sheet or CRM — built as an n8n workflow with an LLM node in the loop.
roadmap.why: Directly monetizable as a freelance service — this is the #1 workflow small businesses pay for.

roadmap.title: Research & Report Pipeline
roadmap.subtitle: Multi-Agent Automation
roadmap.description: A crew of agents that scrapes sources on a topic, cross-checks facts, and compiles a structured report on a schedule — no human clicking 'go' each time.
roadmap.why: Teaches multi-agent orchestration, the skill most AI automation clients actually ask for.

roadmap.title: Support Desk Copilot
roadmap.subtitle: RAG Chatbot + Workflow Automation
roadmap.description: A support chatbot that answers from a company's own docs via RAG, and automatically escalates or files tickets when it can't help — wired into a FastAPI backend I already know how to build.
roadmap.why: The natural bridge from my current backend stack (FastAPI + Postgres) into AI automation.
